seoTitle: Wildes Meadow vs Wiley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wildes Meadow and Wiley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wildes Meadow vs Wiley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wildes Meadow and Wiley Park.
heading: Wildes Meadow vs Wiley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wildes Meadow, New South Wales and Wiley Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wildes Meadow has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Wiley Park (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wildes Meadow or Wiley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wildes Meadow has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Wiley Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wildes Meadow scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Wiley Park scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wildes Meadow or Wiley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wildes Meadow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
